notes: v0.3.69: STATIC FIX. Smooth gap-fill on packet loss in BOTH Raw PCM and Opus paths — hold last sample for 1.3ms (covers single packet drops cleanly), then slow fade, then 32-sample crossfade on recovery. Eliminates click-on-resume that sounded like static. Plus Opus PLC re-enabled for decoder state coherence. Plus MTRO retransmission every ~6s while metronome enabled (UDP loss tolerance for sync).
